message: The protected-branch safety gate must be in force: the protected branch must require a pull request, require the engine checks to pass, require unresolved review conversations to be resolved, and block force-pushes and deletion. This is the gate that lets a non-engineer walk away trusting that nothing reaches the protected branch unchecked. In CI this is verified against the live branch ruleset; on your own machine it reports 'not checked here' because it has no access token, which is expected. If it reports the gate is not in force, apply the protected-branch ruleset using the setup recipe before relying on the merge gate.
